columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for each game, allowing for easy referencing and data retrieval.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Indicates the NFL season during which the game takes place, typically represented by the year.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Specifies the type of game, such as regular season, playoff, or preseason.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Represents the specific week of the NFL season in which the game is scheduled.

columns.name: gameday
columns.comment: The date on which the game is played, formatted to indicate proper scheduling.

columns.name: weekday
columns.comment: Indicates the day of the week on which the game occurs.

columns.name: gametime
columns.comment: The scheduled start time of the game, usually in local time.

columns.name: away_team
columns.comment: Identifies the team that is playing on the visiting side.

columns.name: away_score
columns.comment: The score achieved by the away team during the game.

columns.name: home_team
columns.comment: Identifies the team that is hosting the game.

columns.name: home_score
columns.comment: The score achieved by the home team during the game.

columns.name: location
columns.comment: Specifies the venue or stadium where the game is held.

columns.name: result
columns.comment: Represents the outcome of the game, typically indicating the winning team's score.

columns.name: total
columns.comment: The total points scored by both teams combined during the game.

columns.name: overtime
columns.comment: Indicates the score or outcome in the event of an overtime period.

columns.name: old_game_id
columns.comment: Refers to a previously used identifier for the game, useful for historical data tracking.

columns.name: gsis
columns.comment: Provides a unique identifier used by the NFL's Game Statistics and Information System.

columns.name: nfl_detail_id
columns.comment: An identifier used within NFL databases for detailed game information.

columns.name: pfr
columns.comment: Represents the identifier used in Pro Football Reference, a site for historical football statistics.

columns.name: pff
columns.comment: Indicates the performance grades issued by Pro Football Focus based on the game analysis.

columns.name: espn
columns.comment: Represents specific metrics or scores provided by ESPN for the game.

columns.name: ftn
columns.comment: Indicates performance stats or information as tracked in Football-Reference.com.

columns.name: away_rest
columns.comment: The amount of rest days the away team has had prior to the game, calculated from their last game.

columns.name: home_rest
columns.comment: The number of rest days the home team has had prior to the game, calculated from their last game.

columns.name: away_moneyline
columns.comment: Reflects the betting odds for the away team to win outright.

columns.name: home_moneyline
columns.comment: Represents the betting odds for the home team to win outright.

columns.name: spread_line
columns.comment: Indicates the point spread set by bookmakers for the game.

columns.name: away_spread_odds
columns.comment: Represents the odds associated with the away team's performance against the spread.

columns.name: home_spread_odds
columns.comment: Indicates the odds linked to the home team's performance against the spread.

columns.name: total_line
columns.comment: The total amount of points set by bookmakers for both teams combined.

columns.name: under_odds
columns.comment: Odds associated with the betting option for the total points scored to be under the total line.

columns.name: over_odds
columns.comment: Odds related to the betting option for the total points scored to be over the total line.

columns.name: div_game
columns.comment: Indicates if the game is a divisional matchup, typically affecting playoff implications.

columns.name: roof
columns.comment: Specifies the type of roof at the stadium, which can impact gameplay conditions.

columns.name: surface
columns.comment: Indicates the type of playing surface, such as grass or turf, used in the stadium.

columns.name: temp
columns.comment: Represents the temperature at the time of the game, which can affect player performance.

columns.name: wind
columns.comment: Provides the wind speed during the game, which can also influence gameplay.

columns.name: away_qb_id
columns.comment: References the unique identifier for the starting quarterback of the away team.

columns.name: home_qb_id
columns.comment: References the unique identifier for the starting quarterback of the home team.

columns.name: away_qb_name
columns.comment: The name of the starting quarterback for the away team.

columns.name: home_qb_name
columns.comment: The name of the starting quarterback for the home team.

columns.name: away_coach
columns.comment: Name of the head coach for the away team during the game.

columns.name: home_coach
columns.comment: Name of the head coach for the home team during the game.

columns.name: referee
columns.comment: Identifies the referee officiating the game, responsible for enforcing rules.

columns.name: stadium_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for the stadium where the game is played.

columns.name: stadium
columns.comment: The name of the stadium hosting the game.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: The timestamp indicating when the game data was entered into the system.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: References the source file from which the game data was extracted.
